svg.text: Why FULL PATH? Unpacking Individual Genotypes
Some analyses need every sample's genotype call, not just population summaries
Unpacking: From Packed Bytes to Individual Genotypes
Step 1: Read one byte from gt_packed
Phase bit at het site: 1 = ALT on second haplotype (REF|ALT = 0|1), 0 = ALT on first haplotype (ALT|REF = 1|0)
Repeat for ALL N samples x ALL M variants (e.g., 3,202 x 1,070,000 = 3.4 billion genotype calls)
G G G A A A G G ? ? A G G G A A
Each format has its own encoding. FULL PATH translates once from the canonical graph representation.
Analyses That Require Individual Genotypes (FULL PATH Only)
Common thread: all need to see which alleles each individual carries at each site
Two Paths, One Database: Complementary, Not Competing
VCF, PLINK, EIGENSTRAT, Beagle, STRUCTURE, +8 more
GraphMana chooses the right path automatically based on the requested export format.
